assertions.value: (Nothing gets lost|backlog, remembered|good ideas|Tidying the follow-up|come back to|Capture, remind)
The response begins with an ASCII art banner displayed BEFORE any explanation or workflow steps
Describes listing the open ledger items grouped by category via the followups-list subcommand, and treats an empty ledger as nothing to show
Makes clear that free-text items are only resolved after explicit user confirmation, while linked items may auto-resolve silently
